text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono and I are visiting a shrine at her
request.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh look, a bunch of stalls are set up! Mmm, I can
smell the savory mochi balls and full-bodied
amazake they're selling. How lovely! ☆
choice_data_list: Want to get something to eat?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to! But let's do that later. I want to pray
first.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've been feeling a little off lately, so please help
me get my running back to being buono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Akebono and I pray fervently together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: There, that should do it! I hope my prayer's heard!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's go buy some mochi balls—hm?

text_block_list.name: Shrine Maiden
text_block_list.text:
Hup! Hmmm... Phew. These pilgrimage stamp
books sure are heavy... Aaand hup!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That shrine maiden looks like she's struggling...
Wait here, Trainer! I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono jogs quickly over to the shrine
maiden's side.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hello! If you'd like, I can help you carry those!

text_block_list.name: Shrine Maiden
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your offer, but I can't possibly
impose on a visitor who's come to pray...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I just finished my prayers, actually! Besides, I'd
feel bad if I just kept taking without ever giving
anything in return.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to help others in their time of need! Plus,
I'm really strong!

text_block_list.name: Shrine Maiden
text_block_list.text:
Well, in that case... Hehe. I'd be very grateful for
your aid.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay! You can count on me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Shrine Maiden
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! That was a huge help!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You're very welcome! Let me know if you ever
need a hand again, because I'd be more than
happy to help!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I worked up a great sweat, and I think I feel
better now! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heavens must've looked down favorably upon
Hishi Akebono's kindness, because she feels much
lighter on her feet afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Raaah, hup!

text_block_list.name: Shrine Maiden
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. That was everything. Are you all right,
though? You look a little pale...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Haha... I'm fine! In fact, I could carry about a
million more loads!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono tries to reassure the shrine maiden
with a smile, but her exhaustion is clear as day.
And just after she prayed to feel better too...
